prediction.chief_complaint: acute low back pain after lifting couch

medications.name: ibuprofen
medications.frequency: three times daily with food for 7 to 10 days

medications.name: cyclobenzaprine
medications.frequency: at bedtime as needed for muscle spasm if pain interferes with sleep

plan: ibuprofen 600 mg three times daily with food for 7 to 10 days
cyclobenzaprine 10 mg at bedtime as needed for muscle spasm if pain interferes with sleep
stay active, walk regularly, avoid bed rest
no imaging in first 6 weeks unless red flags develop
return if not significantly better in 4 weeks or if develop leg weakness, numbness, or bowel/bladder changes

follow_up.reason: return if not significantly better in 4 weeks or if develop leg weakness, numbness, or bowel/bladder changes
